allow: Bash(sqlite3 "C:/Users/ZsoltBalogh/OneDrive - R34DY Zrt/Dokumentumok/GitHub/trendsignal-mvp/trendsignal.db" "SELECT DATE\(created_at\) as day, STRFTIME\(''%H'', created_at\) as hour, COUNT\(*\) as total_signals, SUM\(CASE WHEN combined_score = 0 AND technical_score = 0 AND sentiment_score = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as zero_signals, ROUND\(AVG\(combined_score\),2\) as avg_score FROM signals WHERE created_at >= ''2026-03-05 00:00:00'' GROUP BY DATE\(created_at\), STRFTIME\(''%H'', created_at\) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;")

Bash(sqlite3 "C:/Users/ZsoltBalogh/OneDrive - R34DY Zrt/Dokumentumok/GitHub/trendsignal-mvp/trendsignal.db" "SELECT STRFTIME\(''%Y-%m-%d %H:00'', created_at\) as hour_bucket, COUNT\(*\) as total, SUM\(CASE WHEN combined_score = 0 AND technical_score = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as zeros, ROUND\(AVG\(combined_score\),2\) as avg_score, GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT ticker_symbol\) as tickers FROM signals WHERE created_at >= ''2026-03-05 20:00:00'' GROUP BY hour_bucket ORDER BY created_at;")
